# Nika

> Intent as Code · a workflow language for AI. Four verbs (`infer` · `exec` ·
> `invoke` · `agent`), a YAML envelope (`nika: v1` · forever), a closed
> stdlib (27 builtins · 16 providers), and a conformance suite. Apache-2.0
> spec · AGPL-3.0 reference engine in Rust (single static binary).

Workflow files are `*.nika.yaml`. The JSON Schema gives any editor
autocomplete + validation via a `yaml-language-server` modeline:
`https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/schemas/workflow.schema.json`

## Spec

- [Overview](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/00-overview.md): what Nika is · the five design pillars
- [Envelope](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/01-envelope.md): the `nika: v1` marker · top-level shape
- [Verbs](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/02-verbs.md): the four closed verbs · infer · exec · invoke · agent
- [DAG](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/03-dag.md): task ordering · needs · fan-out · when-gates
- [Variables](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/04-variables.md): the five namespaces · CEL + jq expressions
- [Errors](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/05-errors.md): the NIKA-XXX code contract · 14 namespaces
- [Stdlib contract](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/06-stdlib-contract.md): 27 builtins · 16 providers · 9 extract modes
- [Conformance](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/07-conformance.md): three levels · the fixture suite · editor tooling
- [Out of scope](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/spec/08-out-of-scope.md): what Nika deliberately does not do

## Reference

- [Canonical registry](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/canon.yaml): the machine-readable single source of truth
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/schemas/workflow.schema.json): editor autocomplete + validation
- [Builtins](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/stdlib/builtins-v0.1.md): the 27 canonical builtins
- [Providers](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/stdlib/providers-v0.1.md): the 16-provider catalog (local-first)
- [Quickstart](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/QUICKSTART.md): author + check + run a first workflow

## Optional

- [Extract modes](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/stdlib/extract-modes-v0.1.md): the 9 `nika:extract` modes
- [Registry contract](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/registry/registry-v0.1.md): how artifacts are shared — entries, trust model, advisories
- [Changelog](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/supernovae-st/nika-spec/main/CHANGELOG.md): spec evolution log
- [Reference engine](https://github.com/supernovae-st/nika): Rust · AGPL-3.0 · `brew install supernovae-st/tap/nika`
